Get computer training

September 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

The article lists upcoming computer training opportunities for journalists in fall 1995 and winter 1996, including CAR Rock, AP Regional training, and NICAR Bootcamp, with contact information provided.

Get computer training:

CAR ROCK '95 Sept. 21-24, Cleveland, Ohio AP Regional training Oct. 9-10 Birmingham, Ala. Gay and Lesbian Journalist Association Oct. 19-22 Washington, D.C. NICAR Bootcamp, NICAR's week-long intensive training seminar, Jan. 7-12, Columbia, Mo. These dates are open to all journalists. For more information, call NICAR, (314) 882-0684, or send e-mail to nicar@muccmailmissouri.edu.
